productOptionsHtml:

Catalog highlights

  • Reusable tote bag made of durable 80 GSM Non-Woven Polypropylene.
  • Sleek open tote with interior seams.
  • Reinforced handles, 22" in length.
  • Recommended weight tolerance: 11 lbs.
  • 80 GSM non-woven polypropylene

salesToolsHtml:
Pitch this SKU — Non-Woven Value Tote Bag. Lead with use case (uniforms, retail, teams, recognition), then minimums and timeline. Reference included services from “Price includes” in the Description tab when present (e.g. setup, virtual proof, shipping offers).

  • Quote style BG107 on proposals and POs.
  • Offer virtual proofs and artwork checks before production.
  • Cross-sell with hats, bags, or jackets for kit programs.
  • For decoration and imprint methods, follow supplier notes in the Description tab.

Approved partners can request internal sell sheets, comparison matrices, and margin guidance from the A Design Line team.
inventoryHtml:
Merchandise is typically sourced to order. Stock and availability may vary by supplier and season.

Supplier-stated production window: 1 day (not including transit).

Contact the studio for rush feasibility, split shipments, or multi-location drops before placing large orders.

Minimum order quantity: 200 units (per catalog line).
